data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Protects user data using advanced encryption.
data.technical_spec: AES-256, SHA-256 for hashing, and Diffie-Hellman for key exchange.

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Enhances user account security via an additional factor of authentication.
data.technical_spec: Option for SMS or authentication apps.

data.title: Continuous Vulnerability Assessment
data.description: Maintains rigorous security by assessing potential vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Automated scanning tools and regular security audits.

data.title: Conditional Access Policies
data.description: Evaluates risks and enforces access controls based on conditions.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning algorithms for real-time threat analytics.

data.title: Bug Bounty Program
data.description: Engages a global community to identify and remediate vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Managed through reputable platforms like HackerOne.
